2023-24 La Salle Explorers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 16-17 (6-12, 10th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Fran Dunphy

PS/G: 72.7 (205th of 362)

PA/G: 73.1 (217th of 362)

SRS: -1.62 (181st of 362)

SOS: 0.85 (130th of 362)

ORtg: 106.4 (175th of 362)

DRtg: 106.9 (265th of 362)
